test_plan.strategy: Unit tests for folder-scanner.js validity logic and collector integration. Integration tests for admin API folder validation (HTTP). Component tests for AdminAddForm folder type option and helper text. E2E test for full flow: register folder → collector discovers children → dashboard.json contains child cards.

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — 'folder' option appears in type select
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered in jsdom
test_cases.given: the Add Project form is rendered
test_cases.when: the type select options are inspected
test_cases.then: options include 'local', 'remote', and 'folder'
test_cases.expected_result: type select has exactly 3 options: local, remote, folder

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — selecting folder type does not break existing local/remote options
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered
test_cases.given: user changes type from local to folder and back to local
test_cases.then: form state is consistent — no folder-specific helper text visible, location label reads 'Location'
steps: Assert helper text is not visible
test_cases.expected_result: Switching away from folder type hides helper text and restores default labels

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — submitting folder type with valid path calls POST with type='folder'
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered with onAdd mock
test_cases.given: user selects type='folder', enters a valid location, and submits
test_cases.then: onAdd receives payload with type='folder' and the entered location
steps: Assert onAdd called with { type: 'folder', location: '/tmp/workspace' }
test_cases.expected_result: onAdd payload contains type='folder'

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — submitting folder type with empty location shows location_required error
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered
test_cases.given: user selects type='folder' and submits without entering a location
test_cases.then: onAdd is NOT called; inline error for location field is shown
test_cases.expected_result: Submission blocked; location error displayed

test_cases.title: Collector — folder-type project expands into child entries in dashboard.json
preconditions: tmpdir with 2 valid child directories (each has package.json)
test_cases.given: a project registered as type='folder' pointing to a dir with 2 valid children
test_cases.when: collectOne is called with that project
test_cases.then: returns an array of 2 project entries, each with location pointing to the child directory
steps: Assert result is an array of length 2
test_cases.expected_result: Array of 2 child project entries — parent folder not in result

test_cases.title: Collector — parent folder entry does not appear in dashboard.json output
preconditions: tmpdir with 1 valid child
test_cases.given: a folder-type project with 1 valid child
test_cases.then: the returned array contains only the child entry; no entry with the parent folder's name appears
steps: Call collectOne({ type: 'folder', name: 'My Workspace', location: tmpdir })
test_cases.expected_result: Parent folder name absent from results; only child present

test_cases.title: Collector — folder with 0 valid children returns empty array (no crash)
preconditions: tmpdir with 0 valid children (no package.json, no .aitri)
test_cases.given: a folder-type project where no children are valid projects
test_cases.then: returns an empty array; no error thrown
test_cases.expected_result: Empty array — no crash, no undefined

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — child with package.json is valid
preconditions: tmpdir with one subdirectory containing package.json
test_cases.given: a child directory containing package.json
test_cases.then: the child appears in the returned array
test_cases.expected_result: Child directory with package.json included in results

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — child with .aitri directory is valid
preconditions: tmpdir with one subdirectory containing .aitri/
test_cases.given: a child directory containing a .aitri directory
test_cases.then: the child appears in the returned array
test_cases.expected_result: Child directory with .aitri included in results

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — child with no package.json or .aitri is skipped
preconditions: tmpdir with one subdirectory containing only a README.md
test_cases.given: a child directory with no package.json and no .aitri directory
test_cases.then: the child does not appear in results
test_cases.expected_result: Empty result — invalid child skipped

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — files at root level are skipped (not directories)
preconditions: tmpdir with a file at root level (not a subdirectory)
test_cases.given: a file (not a directory) exists directly inside the folder
test_cases.then: the file is skipped and not included in results
test_cases.expected_result: File at folder root skipped; empty results

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST with type='folder' and valid directory returns 201
preconditions: hub server running; valid directory exists
test_cases.given: POST /api/projects with type='folder' and location pointing to an existing directory
test_cases.then: response 201; projects.json contains entry with type='folder'
test_cases.expected_result: 201 with folder entry persisted

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST with type='folder' and non-existent path returns 400 path_not_found
preconditions: hub server running
test_cases.given: POST /api/projects with type='folder' and location that does not exist
test_cases.then: response 400 with body { error: 'path_not_found' }
test_cases.expected_result: 400 path_not_found

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST with type='folder' pointing to a file returns 400 not_a_directory
preconditions: hub server running; a file exists at a known path
test_cases.given: POST /api/projects with type='folder' and location pointing to a regular file
test_cases.then: response 400 with body { error: 'not_a_directory' }
steps: Write a temp file at tmpdir/testfile.txt
test_cases.expected_result: 400 not_a_directory

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — helper text visible when type='folder' is selected
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered in jsdom
test_cases.given: user selects type='folder'
test_cases.then: helper text containing 'Scans immediate child directories' is visible in the DOM
steps: Assert helper text element is present and contains expected text
test_cases.expected_result: Helper text 'Scans immediate child directories' visible

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — helper text NOT visible when type='local' is selected
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered in jsdom
test_cases.given: default state with type='local'
test_cases.when: form is rendered without changing type
test_cases.then: no helper text about 'Scans immediate child directories' is visible
steps: Assert helper text element is absent from DOM
test_cases.expected_result: Helper text absent for non-folder types

test_cases.title: AdminAddForm — location label reads 'Folder path' when type='folder'
preconditions: AdminAddForm rendered in jsdom
test_cases.given: user selects type='folder'
test_cases.when: form label for location is inspected
test_cases.then: label text is 'Folder path' (not 'Location')
steps: Assert location label text equals 'Folder path'
test_cases.expected_result: Location label updates to 'Folder path' when type='folder'

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — discovered children include parentFolder field
preconditions: tmpdir with 1 valid child
test_cases.given: scanFolder(folderPath) is called
test_cases.then: each entry has parentFolder field equal to folderPath
test_cases.expected_result: parentFolder field equals the scanned folder path

test_cases.title: Collector — manually-registered local project has no parentFolder field
preconditions: project with type='local'
test_cases.given: a project registered with type='local'
test_cases.then: the entry does not have a parentFolder field
test_cases.expected_result: No parentFolder field on local project entries

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — parentFolder field uses exact registered path string
preconditions: tmpdir with trailing slash in path
test_cases.given: scanFolder is called with a path that has a trailing slash
test_cases.then: parentFolder field value matches the exact path string passed to scanFolder
test_cases.expected_result: parentFolder preserves exact input path string

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — missing folder path returns empty array (no crash)
preconditions: folder path does not exist on disk
test_cases.given: scanFolder is called with a path that does not exist
test_cases.then: scanFolder returns [] without throwing
test_cases.expected_result: Empty array — ENOENT handled gracefully

test_cases.title: folder-scanner — symlinks are skipped (not followed)
preconditions: tmpdir with a symlink to a valid project outside the folder
test_cases.given: a symlink inside the folder pointing to a directory with package.json
test_cases.then: the symlink is skipped and does not appear in results
test_cases.expected_result: Symlink skipped; result is empty even though target has package.json

test_cases.title: E2E — register folder type project; dashboard shows child cards
preconditions: hub server running; tmpdir with 2 valid child projects
test_cases.given: user POSTs a folder-type project via admin API
test_cases.then: GET /data/dashboard.json contains 2 project entries with parentFolder matching the registered location
steps: POST { name: 'workspace', type: 'folder', location: tmpdir } to /api/projects
Wait for collector cycle (poll /data/dashboard.json up to 10s)
Assert dashboard.projects contains 2 entries with parentFolder === tmpdir
Assert no entry with name 'workspace' in dashboard.projects
test_cases.expected_result: 2 child cards in dashboard; parent folder entry absent

test_cases.title: E2E — folder with no valid children produces no cards in dashboard
preconditions: hub server running; tmpdir with no valid project children
test_cases.given: user registers a folder-type project pointing to a directory with no valid children
test_cases.then: GET /data/dashboard.json has 0 entries with that parentFolder; no crash
steps: POST { name: 'empty-workspace', type: 'folder', location: tmpdir } to /api/projects
Assert no entry has parentFolder === tmpdir
Assert server still responds to GET /health with 200
test_cases.expected_result: No child cards; server healthy
